scope: 10 firmographic companies excluding China and Hong Kong

api_comparison.Fields Returned: Employee Count; Founded Year; Headcount Growth (1 Year); Headquarters Location; Industry; LinkedIn URL; Ownership Type; Revenue / Revenue Band; Sub-Industry (NAICS/SIC); Website Domain
api_comparison.Free-Tier Limitations: Trial credit information is public, but exact API entitlement is account/plan dependent. Observed call limits: 600/day, 200/hour, 50/minute.
api_comparison.Paid-Tier Benefits: Plan-dependent API access, higher/adjusted rate limits, and add-on credits. Exact field gating must be confirmed in the Apollo account.
api_comparison.Notes: Fields not returned or not independently validated: Legal Name; Number of Sites/Locations (Singapore + Global); Total Funding Raised. Raw responses and usage trace are saved.

api_comparison.Fields Returned: Employee Count; Founded Year; Headcount Growth (1 Year); Headquarters Location; Industry; Legal Name; LinkedIn URL; Number of Sites/Locations (Singapore + Global); Ownership Type; Revenue / Revenue Band; Sub-Industry (NAICS/SIC); Total Funding Raised; Website Domain
api_comparison.Free-Tier Limitations: Free trial gives 200 Collect and 400 Search credits for eligible new users; credits are valid for 7 days. Multi-source company enrich uses 2 Collect credits per successful request.
api_comparison.Paid-Tier Benefits: Starter/Pro/Premium paid plans provide monthly Search/Collect credits and documentation access; higher tiers offer larger/custom credits and additional support/features.
api_comparison.Notes: Parsed from saved Coresignal Multi-source Company raw exports. Fields not returned or not calculated: Headcount Growth (1 Year); Total Funding Raised.

api_trace.Authentication Type: API Key (X-Api-Key used in successful run)
api_trace.Free Credits / Tokens: Apollo public pricing FAQ says trial plans include 50 credits. API usage endpoint does not expose account-level free-credit entitlement.
api_trace.Gated Fields: Legal Name; Number of Sites/Locations (Singapore + Global); Total Funding Raised
api_trace.Free Tier Limitation: Apollo docs state advanced API access depends on the organization plan; selected endpoint did not return legal registered name, verified site count, or total funding.
api_trace.Paid Plan Cost: Apollo public page: API access is available on Custom plans for advanced integrations. Unlimited fair-use note references paid amount / $0.025 or 1M annual account cap. Exact account cost requires Apollo quote/account page.
api_trace.Paid Tier Benefits: Plan-dependent API access/rate limits, add-on credits, and advanced integration access; exact gated firmographic fields require Apollo account confirmation.
api_trace.Ease of Integration: 3/5 - enrichment call is simple, but credit validation needs a separate usage endpoint and master API key; field coverage must be audited manually from raw JSON.
api_trace.API Documentation Quality: 4/5 - endpoint, credit-consuming endpoints, and usage endpoint are documented; exact plan gating/pricing is partly account-login dependent.
api_trace.Remarks: Credit usage reported as total only: 10 Apollo organization-enrichment credits were used for 10 successful company calls. Usage trace JSON is retained as internal audit evidence.
api_trace.Estimated Cost per 100 Companies: About 100 Apollo organization-enrichment credits based on observed 1 credit per successful company call; currency cost not verified.

api_trace.Free Credits / Tokens: Free trial: 200 Collect credits and 400 Search credits, valid 7 days for the first eligible user/team/domain.
api_trace.Credits / Tokens Used: 0 - reused saved Coresignal Multi-source Company raw exports from Firmographic/raw/coresignal/data.
api_trace.Rate Limit: Multi-source Company API: 18 req/sec search, 18 req/sec enrichment, 27 req/sec bulk collect, 54 req/sec collection.
api_trace.Gated Fields: Headcount Growth (1 Year); Total Funding Raised
api_trace.Free Tier Limitation: Trial credits are time-limited. Multi-source company enrich costs 2 Collect credits per successful request, so 10 companies would estimate 20 Collect credits.
api_trace.Paid Plan Cost: Company API pricing: Starter from $49/month, Pro from $800/month, Premium from $1,500/month. Starter shows 200 Collect and 400 Search credits; Pro shows 250-50,000 Collect and 500-150,000 Search credits; Premium custom.
api_trace.Paid Tier Benefits: Paid plans provide monthly Search/Collect credits, documentation access, and higher/custom credit packages. Higher tiers can include account manager and historical headcount API per pricing page.
api_trace.Ease of Integration: 4/5 - existing Multi-source Company raw exports map directly to the HPI firmographic field set.
api_trace.API Documentation Quality: 4/5 - endpoint, rate limits, free trial credits, paid plan ranges, and per-request credit rules are documented clearly.
api_trace.Remarks: Coresignal raw company-enrichment responses were already present from the technographic workstream and are now parsed into the firmographic report.
api_trace.Estimated Cost per 100 Companies: Multi-source Company enrich: about 200 Collect credits for 100 companies, because docs state 2 collection credits per successful enrich request.
